briefdescription.para: Value to clear IRQ status of glitch detector.
Value to generate test glitch on glitch detector0.
Value to generate test glitch on glitch detector1.
Value to stop test glitch generation on both the glitch detectors.

memberdef.name: DEVICE_INT_ID
memberdef.initializer: 191U /* when using for PL,change interrupt ID here */

briefdescription.para: This is interrupt service routine of glitch detector.

detaileddescription.para: User code can be written here. Some default actions like reading the glitch detector status and clearing IRQ status, disabling interrupt on entry and enabling at exit is done here.

briefdescription.para: This function generates glitch on given glitch detector.
This main function to call the In-Place ASU Update example function to perform ASU firmware update.

detaileddescription.para: Main function to call the user module example functions.
Main function to call the Load DDR Copy Image example function.
Main function to call the config secure communication function.
Main function to call the ExtractMetaheader example function.

listitem.para: XST_SUCCESS, if example is run successfully.
Handoff to the ROM on success.

inbodydescription.para: Perform In-Place ASU Update based on configured source.
Invoke Generate for IV, SharedMem contains random data from this call. Only 12 bytes will be used for each IV

To generate glitch using test mode, configure glitch detectors with default values. To configure glitch detector to detect glitch of at least 5% depth, 1ns width with 0.7V reference voltage, provide Depth = 0x0E, Width = 0x01, RefVoltage = 0x04.To select the register values instead of efuse values, provide UserRegVal = 0x01

briefdescription.para: This file illustrates glitch detector usage To build this application, xilmailbox and xilpm libraries must be included in BSP and xilplmi library must be in client mode.

detaileddescription.para: This example is supported for Versal and Versal Net devices.
Generate pdi with glitch_detection_overlay cdo. Load the Pdi. Select the target. Download the example elf into the target.

para.heading: Procedure to test glitch on hardware

detaileddescription.para: Refer versal plm wiki to configure the glitch detector

This code intends to provide an example to test the glitch detector functionality by generating the test glitch. User must disable that and have a programmable power supply for Vcc_PMC and generate the actual glitch by varying the power supply

para.preformatted:
Ver Who Date Changes
1.00 pre 06/09/2024 Initial release pre 07/15/2024 Added support for SDT flow and fixed misrac warnings pre 07/26/2024 Corrected base address for SDT flow pre 10/19/2024 Added support for PL microblaze
